name: Jesus On The Mainline
chorusText:
Jesus on the mainline.

*  Jesus on the mainline
Tell Him what you want
Tell Him what you want
Tell Him what you want
Jesus on the mainline now

*  If you want salvation,
*  If you want salvation,
*  If you want salvation,

*  If you want the victory
*  If you want the victory
*  If you want the victory
